herbs.name: heimia salicifolia (sinicuichi)
herbs.title: heimia salicifolia (sinicuichi) | The Hippie Scientist
herbs.description: Heimia salicifolia has traditional ethnobotanical use for altered perception and calming effects, while modern controlled clinical evidence is limited.

herbs.name: papaver somniferum
herbs.title: papaver somniferum | The Hippie Scientist
herbs.description: This plant has strong opioid-related pharmacology and safety liabilities; non-medical use carries high overdose and dependence risk.

herbs.name: mentha piperita
herbs.title: mentha piperita | The Hippie Scientist
herbs.description: Mentha piperita has human and preclinical evidence for gastrointestinal symptom support, while efficacy depends on preparation and indication.

herbs.name: achillea millefolium
herbs.title: achillea millefolium | The Hippie Scientist
herbs.description: Achillea millefolium is used for digestive, inflammatory, and wound-related traditional indications with mixed modern evidence quality.

herbs.name: nepeta cataria
herbs.title: nepeta cataria | The Hippie Scientist
herbs.description: Nepeta cataria is traditionally used for mild calming and digestive support, with limited modern clinical evidence.

herbs.description: Current promoted evidence for Ipomoea tricolor is mechanistic and ecological, not human clinical efficacy evidence.

compounds.name: CBD
compounds.title: CBD | The Hippie Scientist

compounds.name: Agrimoniin
